title: Subnet Calc
helpOutput:
Usage: subnet-calc [<options>] <cidr>

  Calculate subnet details from CIDR notation.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <cidr>  CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24 or 10.0.0.0/8)
